text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I just suddenly feel like eating... Ehehe. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But don't worry! I have a feeling this level of
hunger will help guide me to the finish line even
faster!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm going to get first place, then eat a
whooole lot when I get back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Hishi Akebono is full of energy and raring to go!
